'''Nin Nemb''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Holding the rank of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]], Nemb participated in [[Operation Cobolt]], a mission to retrieve an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scandoc decoding computer]] from an [[Imperial orbital base|orbital base]] over [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]]. [[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighters]] were deployed to draw the base's complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] away to allow a [[Marines (SpecForce)|Marine]] assault force to capture the device. The operation was a success, but Nemb was badly wounded and his fighter damaged. Nonetheless, he heroically brought his damaged ship back to the rendezvous point, but [[Death/Legends|died]] before he could be treated for his injuries.<ref name="Report" />

==Appearances==
